§6Vent Ducts§f

§aBuild ventilation systems to route smoke through walls and ceilings!§f
§bVent Ducts§f are the intermediate blocks of the §9Advanced Chimneys§f ventilation system. Each material type has a Vent variant (meta `:1`) that allows smoke to pass through walls, floors, and ceilings, creating routed exhaust paths.

§6Key Features§f:
§b• Smoke Routing§f: Vents connect chimneys to remote locations, allowing smoke to travel through enclosed spaces.
§b• Aesthetic Integration§f: Available in all the same materials as chimneys (brick, cobblestone, concrete, glass, terracotta, and more), so vents blend seamlessly into builds.
§b• Advanced Ventilation§f: Combined with pumps and chimneys, vents form a complete ventilation network for industrial facilities.

§eTip§f: Use vents behind walls to hide smoke pipes while maintaining realistic exhaust flow throughout your base. Combine with §bPumps§f for active ventilation in enclosed spaces.
